elements.name: nova-template
elements.description: Vue marker for binding compiled Nova SFC templates to a Nova canvas.

attributes.name: src
attributes.description: Path to a `.nova` file used by the Nova Vite compiler.

attributes.name: source
attributes.description: Debug source path injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

attributes.name: debug-id
attributes.description: Debug identifier injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

vue-components.name: nova-template
vue-components.description: Vue marker for binding compiled Nova SFC templates to a Nova canvas.

props.name: src
props.description: Path to a `.nova` file used by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: component
props.description: Compiled Nova component constructor injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: source
props.description: Debug source path injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: debug-id
props.description: Debug identifier injected by the Nova Vite compiler.

props.name: options
props.description: Template options forwarded to the compiled Nova component.

props.name: data
props.description: Template data forwarded to the compiled Nova component.
